creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
On Fri, 6 Apr 2012, David Naylor wrote:
> Based on http://wiki.winehq.org/Gecko Wine switched to a newer version
> of gecko with 1.5.0, so zero chance :-(
> 
> Would you like me to prepare a wine-devel-gecko port?  It is just a 
> trivial change to wine-gecko (it even shouldn't conflict with 
> wine-gecko, mostly).

Yes, please.  I pressume you volunteer to maintain that port? 
If you want to send it my way, I'll be happy to commit it for
you (and the same applies for updates).


Gerald
